title: Ubiquiti UISP-R-Pro, UISP Router professional
description: UISP-R-Pro is the ideal router due to its performance for deployment in the corporate sphere. The router has 8x Gigabit LAN , 1x Gigabit WAN, 4x SFP+ (1G and 10G support) ports for further expansion using optical fiber and 1.3" LCD touch screen for a simple display of the status and load of the router. UISP Router Pro is a router packed with functions and ports with an emphasis on quality, reliability and ease of installation. The router can be powered primarily via 230V AC from the network but… (8) Gigabit LAN + (1) Gigabit WAN (4) 10G SFP+ port 19" rackmount design Up to 9500 Mbps throughput in NAT / 2250 Mbps throughput with QoS Support for Firewall, OSPF routing and shaping Power supply via 230V AC but also via Power TransPort for DC redundancy Easy setup using Bluetooth via mobile app UISP 1.4.5 and above Device Power cord Rackmount kit
